description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge on the right side, upholstered in a smooth, light taupe fabric. The sofa features three main seat sections and a chaise, each with attached, rectangular back cushions that are subtly tufted for a contemporary look. The armrests are straight, low, and padded, matching the height of the seat cushions and providing a clean, boxy silhouette. The legs are short, block-style, and barely visible, giving the sofa a grounded appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a matte finish, and the overall design is minimalist, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living spaces. The sofa appears comfortable and spacious, designed to accommodate multiple people.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light taupe fabric with a chaise lounge, straight padded armrests, and subtly tufted back cushions. The design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat sections, chaise lounge on the right, and all back cushions and armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length, with minimal visible leg structure.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the chaise extension and the clean lines of the armrest and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four attached, rectangular seat cushions and four matching back cushions, all uniform in size and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout with subtle tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile, padded armrests at both ends, matching the seat height and featuring a boxy, minimalist design with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners and possibly central support, minimally visible and likely made of wood or plastic, recessed for a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest segmented into four attached, rectangular cushions with subtle horizontal tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery in light taupe with a smooth, matte texture and subtle horizontal tufting on the back cushions.
